mapper.select: SELECT #{baseDate} AS BASE_DATE, locf.BATCH_RUN_NO AS LOCF_BATCH_RUN_NO, locf.STATUS_CODE AS LOCF_STATUS_CODE, locf.FINISHED_AT AS LOCF_FINISHED_AT, prv.BATCH_RUN_NO AS PROVISION_BATCH_RUN_NO, prv.STATUS_CODE AS PROVISION_STATUS_CODE, prv.FINISHED_AT AS PROVISION_FINISHED_AT, CASE WHEN locf.STATUS_CODE = 'COMPLETED' AND prv.STATUS_CODE = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'PROVISION_CLOSED' WHEN locf.STATUS_CODE = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'PROVISION_READY' WHEN locf.STATUS_CODE IS NULL THEN 'LOCF_REQUIRED' ELSE 'LOCF_IN_PROGRESS' END AS CLOSING_STATUS_CODE, CASE WHEN locf.STATUS_CODE = 'COMPLETED' AND prv.STATUS_CODE = 'COMPLETED' THEN '충당금 검증 후 전표 생성 단계로 진행' WHEN locf.STATUS_CODE = 'COMPLETED' THEN '충당금 배치 실행' WHEN locf.STATUS_CODE IS NULL THEN 'LOCF 배치 실행' ELSE 'LOCF 결과 확인' END AS NEXT_ACTION FROM DUAL seed LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BATCH_RUN_NO, STATUS_CODE, FINISHED_AT FROM LOCF_BATCH_EXECUTION WHERE BASE_DATE = #{baseDate} AND BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = ( SELECT MAX(BATCH_EXECUTION_ID) FROM LOCF_BATCH_EXECUTION WHERE BASE_DATE = #{baseDate} ) ) locf ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BATCH_RUN_NO, STATUS_CODE, FINISHED_AT FROM PRV_BATCH_EXECUTION WHERE BASE_DATE = #{baseDate} AND BATCH_EXECUTION_ID = ( SELECT MAX(BATCH_EXECUTION_ID) FROM PRV_BATCH_EXECUTION WHERE BASE_DATE = #{baseDate} ) ) prv ON 1 = 1
